Table of Contents

Interface CircularArc

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

A portion of a circle that connects two points optionally has measure, height and ID attributes at each endpoint.

[Guid("991F5C10-BC4C-11D0-8303-0000F8034032")]
public interface CircularArc : ICircularArc, ICurve, IGeometry
